title: enterolobium timbouva
intro: Enterolobium timbouva, also known as the tamarindo or timbó, is a tropical tree native to the Americas, particularly in Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Enterolobium timbouva include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Enterolobium timbouva can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
